message:
fix(a11y): improve SpotlightSearch keyboard and screen reader support

SearchResultItem accessibility improvements:

1. Changed aria-selected to aria-current="true":
   - aria-selected is semantically correct for listbox/option patterns
   - aria-current is more appropriate for indicating the currently
     focused/active item in a custom interactive list
   - Screen readers announce "current" state more naturally for this
     navigation context

2. Added onKeyDown handler to "Add to excerpt" button:
   - Stops event propagation for Enter and Space key presses
   - Prevents the parent result item from also receiving the keyboard
     event when the button is activated
   - Fixes potential double-action bug where pressing Enter on the
     button could both add to excerpt AND navigate to the result

These changes improve the experience for keyboard-only users and
screen reader users navigating the spotlight search results.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
